description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 30, 2025 at 1:34 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a pickup truck on 1st Street near Folsom Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound on 1st Street in the rightmost lane. A pickup truck that was initially traveling southeastbound 
on 1st Street directly in front of the Waymo AV came to a stop, and the Waymo AV came to a stop to yield to the stopped pickup truck. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, the pickup truck reversed and the rear of the pickup truck made contact with the front of the stationary 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage. 
 
Waymo is reporting this crash under Request No. 1 of Standing General Order 2021-01 because a vehicle involved was towed away. 
Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting with additional information as it may become available. 
Print
Clear Form
